reasoning_model_1: Model 1 accurately follows the provided script '我对你的提议不感兴趣。' without any errors. The audio exhibits high fluency and naturalness. In terms of the specific paralinguistic feature 'cold tone' (冷淡的语气), the speaker adopts a detached, flat intonation with a slightly lower pitch. The deliberate pause after '提议' (00:01) effectively conveys a sense of disinterest and distance. The delivery is unenthusiastic and successfully matches the 'cold' attitude requirement.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 fails the core requirement of Content Accuracy. The command required the model to say '我对你的提议不感兴趣。', but the model generated completely different text: '你的提议对我而言毫无吸引力，我不会为此多花一分心思。' (Your proposal has no appeal to me...). While the audio quality is clear, this is a hallucination or unauthorized paraphrasing in a Text-to-Speech context. According to the evaluation criterion, if voice content is clearly inconsistent with the script, the score must be 0.
model_comparison: Model 1 followed the instructions perfectly, delivering the correct text with the required cold and indifferent attitude. Model 2 failed to generate the correct text, paraphrasing the content entirely, which constitutes a critical error in Content Accuracy. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
